headline: Bob Iger, Joshua Kushner Explore Bid for NBA Expansion Team
summary: (Bloomberg) -- Former Walt Disney Co. Chief Executive Officer Bob Iger and Thrive Capital founder Joshua Kushner have hired investment bankers and discussed making a bid for the National Basketball Association expansion team in Las Vegas, according to people familiar with their plans. headline: CNBC Daily Open: Hostilities halted again as peace talks continue
summary: The U.S. and Iran agree to pause fresh hostilities, sending futures higher. But concerns over the peace talks continue, pushing oil back above $70 a barrel.
